name: Flash
description: Flash channels unstable lightning energy into relentless combo pressure.
passive: High-risk, high-reward tempo duelist. The longer his correct-answer chain survives, the deadlier each hit becomes.
ultimateDescription: Flash enters Overclock for 6 seconds. Each correct answer builds increasing bonus damage. Wrong answers reset the combo.

name: Shadow
description: Shadow infiltrates the flow of the game itself, distorting perception and disrupting focus. As corruption builds, even the smallest mistakes can spiral out of control.
passive: Psychological disruptor. He pressures opponents into missteps by bending rhythm and clarity without ever fully taking control away.
ultimateDescription: For 5s, corrupt the opponent’s interface. Their mistakes build stacks that detonate for bonus damage.

name: Guardian
description: Guardian stands immovable at the center of the fight, bending incoming force into his own power. Within his Aegis Domain, enemies struggle to break through while their own aggression turns against them.
passive: Elite defensive tank that converts enemy pressure into retaliation.
ultimateDescription: Guardian creates an Aegis Domain for 6 seconds, greatly reducing incoming damage, reflecting minor damage back to attackers, and unleashing a shockwave when the effect ends.

name: Inferno
description: Inferno feeds on momentum, turning every correct answer into a growing blaze that consumes his opponent. The longer he stays accurate, the harder it becomes to stop the burn.
passive: High-pressure carry that snowballs through accuracy and sustained burn stacks.
ultimateDescription: For 6s, correct answers apply stacking burn damage over time. Stacks grow stronger and refresh, but reset on a wrong answer.

name: Architect
howItPlays: Build marks with accurate answers. Land 3 correct answers in a row during your ultimate to consume marks in a decisive Perfect Strike.
description: Architect doesn’t rely on chaos—he designs victory. Every correct answer builds toward a calculated sequence, and when executed perfectly, the result is devastating.
passive: Precision burst specialist. Planning and consistent accuracy unlocks high-value payoff windows without relying on randomness.
ultimateDescription: For 6s, correct answers place marks on the opponent. Land 3 in a row to consume the marks in a powerful Perfect Strike. Wrong answers reset the sequence.

name: Titan
howItPlays: Activate Overpower and keep answering correctly to build momentum. After 2 correct answers in a row, your next hit becomes a Break Hit that smashes through defenses.
description: Titan doesn’t rely on precision or tricks—only force. Each strike lands with overwhelming power, and once momentum builds, even the strongest defenses shatter.
passive: Raw force premium bruiser. Simple, aggressive, and built for high-impact damage windows earned through correct answers.
ultimateDescription: For 5s, correct answers deal heavy bonus damage. After 2 in a row, the next hit becomes a defense-breaking strike. Wrong answers reset the chain.
